SEARCH
Package fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.plugins

Interface ClientSubscriptionI

All Superinterfaces:
fr.sorbonne_u.components.PluginI, Serializable
All Known Implementing Classes:
ClientSubscriptionPlugin
public interface ClientSubscriptionI extends fr.sorbonne_u.components.PluginI
The interface ClientSubscriptionI declares the signatures of methods that a client subscription plug-in must implement.

Description

Invariants

 invariant      true        // no more invariant

Created on : 2026-02-04

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    channelAuthorised(String channel)
    return true if the use of channel is authorised for the component, otherwise false.
    boolean
    channelExist(String channel)
    return true if channel exists, otherwise false.
    Future<MessageI>
    getNextMessage(String channel)
    get a future on the next message received from channel.
    void
    modifyFilter(String channel, MessageFilterI filter)
    modify the filter associated to the subscription of this component to channel.
    void
    receive(String channel, MessageI message)
    receive passively message from channel; the call is executed asynchronously to free the client component thread as soon as the corresponding task is submitted to the receiver.
    void
    receive(String channel, MessageI[] messages)
    receive passively messages from channel; the call is executed asynchronously to free the client component thread as soon as the corresponding task is submitted to the receiver.
    void
    subscribe(String channel, MessageFilterI filter)
    subscribe to channel with filter.
    boolean
    subscribed(String channel)
    return true if this component already subscribed to channel.
    void
    unsubscribe(String channel)
    unsubscribe to channel.
    MessageI
    waitForNextMessage(String channel)
    wait for the next message received from channel, the caller thread being blocked until such a message is delivered from channel.
    MessageI
    waitForNextMessage(String channel, Duration d)
    wait for the next message received from channel, the caller thread being blocked for a maximum duration d, returning null if no message has been received during the next d period of time.

    Methods inherited from interface fr.sorbonne_u.components.PluginI

    finalise, getPluginURI, getPreferredExecutionServiceIndex, getPreferredExecutionServiceURI, initialise, installOn, isCallerRuns, isInitialised, setPluginURI, setPreferredExecutionServiceURI, uninstall

  • Method Details

    • channelExist

      boolean channelExist(String channel)
      return true if channel exists, otherwise false.

      Contract

       pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Parameters:
      channel - name of a potential channel.
      Returns:
      true if channel exists, otherwise false.

    • channelAuthorised

      boolean channelAuthorised(String channel) throws UnknownClientException, UnknownChannelException
      return true if the use of channel is authorised for the component, otherwise false.

      Contract

       pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Parameters:
      channel - name of an existing channel.
      Returns:
      true if the use of channel is authorised for the component, otherwise false.
      Throws:
      UnknownClientException - when the component is not registered on the publication/subscription system yet.
      UnknownChannelException - when channel does not exist.

    • subscribed

      boolean subscribed(String channel) throws UnknownClientException, UnknownChannelException
      return true if this component already subscribed to channel.

      Contract

       pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Parameters:
      channel - name of an existing channel.
      Returns:
      true if this component already subscribed to channel.
      Throws:
      UnknownClientException - when the component is not registered on the publication/subscription system yet.
      UnknownChannelException - when channel does not exist.

    • subscribe

      void subscribe(String channel, MessageFilterI filter) throws UnknownClientException, UnknownChannelException, UnauthorisedClientException
      subscribe to channel with filter.

      Contract

       pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 pre    filter != null
 post   subscribed(channel)
      Parameters:
      channel - name of an existing channel.
      filter - filter to be applied to messages to decide if this component must receive them.
      Throws:
      UnknownClientException - when the component is not registered on the publication/subscription system yet.
      UnknownChannelException - when channel does not exist.
      UnauthorisedClientException - when the client is not authorised to subscribe to channel.

    • unsubscribe

      void unsubscribe(String channel) throws UnknownClientException, UnknownChannelException, UnauthorisedClientException, NotSubscribedChannelException
      unsubscribe to channel.

      Contract

       pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 post   !subscribed(channel)
      Parameters:
      channel - name of an existing channel.
      Throws:
      UnknownClientException - when the component is not registered on the publication/subscription system yet.
      UnknownChannelException - when channel does not exist.
      UnauthorisedClientException - when the client is not authorised to use channel.
      NotSubscribedChannelException - when the client has not subscribed to channel.

    • modifyFilter

      void modifyFilter(String channel, MessageFilterI filter) throws UnknownClientException, UnknownChannelException, UnauthorisedClientException, NotSubscribedChannelException
      modify the filter associated to the subscription of this component to channel.

      Contract

       pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Parameters:
      channel - name of an existing channel.
      filter - filter to be applied to messages to decide if this component must receive them.
      Throws:
      UnknownClientException - when the component is not registered on the publication/subscription system yet.
      UnknownChannelException - when channel does not exist.
      UnauthorisedClientException - when the client is not authorised to use channel.
      NotSubscribedChannelException - when the client has not subscribed to channel.

    • receive

      void receive(String channel, MessageI message)
      receive passively message from channel; the call is executed asynchronously to free the client component thread as soon as the corresponding task is submitted to the receiver.

      Contract

       pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Parameters:
      channel - name of an existing channel.
      message - message to be received from channel.

    • receive

      void receive(String channel, MessageI[] messages)
      receive passively messages from channel; the call is executed asynchronously to free the client component thread as soon as the corresponding task is submitted to the receiver.

      Contract

       pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 pre    messages != null && messages.size() > 0
 pre    Stream.of(messages).allMatch(m -> m != null)
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Parameters:
      channel - name of the channel from which messsage is received.
      messages - array of messages received by the component.

    • waitForNextMessage

      MessageI waitForNextMessage(String channel) throws UnknownClientException, UnknownChannelException, UnauthorisedClientException, NotSubscribedChannelException
      wait for the next message received from channel, the caller thread being blocked until such a message is delivered from channel.

      Contract

       pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 post   return != null
      Parameters:
      channel - name of an existing channel.
      Returns:
      the next message received from channel.
      Throws:
      UnknownClientException - when the component is not registered on the publication/subscription system yet.
      UnknownChannelException - when channel does not exist.
      UnauthorisedClientException - when the client is not authorised to use channel.
      NotSubscribedChannelException - when the client has not subscribed to channel.

    • waitForNextMessage

      MessageI waitForNextMessage(String channel, Duration d) throws UnknownClientException, UnknownChannelException, UnauthorisedClientException, NotSubscribedChannelException
      wait for the next message received from channel, the caller thread being blocked for a maximum duration d, returning null if no message has been received during the next d period of time.

      Contract

       pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 pre    d != null
 pre    !d.isZero()
 pre    !d.isNegative()
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Parameters:
      channel - name of an existing channel.
      d - maximum duration of the wait.
      Returns:
      the next message received from channel or null if none.
      Throws:
      UnknownClientException - when the component is not registered on the publication/subscription system yet.
      UnknownChannelException - when channel does not exist.
      UnauthorisedClientException - when the client is not authorised to use channel.
      NotSubscribedChannelException - when the client has not subscribed to channel.

    • getNextMessage

      Future<MessageI> getNextMessage(String channel) throws UnknownClientException, UnknownChannelException, UnauthorisedClientException, NotSubscribedChannelException
      get a future on the next message received from channel.

      Contract

       pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 post   return != null
      Parameters:
      channel - name of an existing channel.
      Returns:
      the next message received from channel.
      Throws:
      UnknownClientException - when the component is not registered on the publication/subscription system yet.
      UnknownChannelException - when channel does not exist.
      UnauthorisedClientException - when the client is not authorised to use channel.
      NotSubscribedChannelException - when the client has not subscribed to channel.
